title: Sidewalk Tacos

hero.headline: Sidewalk Tacos
hero.subheadline: Al pastor, carnitas, and quesabirria from a roaming kitchen

body:
# Welcome

Sidewalk Tacos is a Portland food truck serving lunch Tuesday through Saturday. We post today's **location** on this site and on Instagram — the menu below is what we are running on the truck right now.

## How to order

- Walk up to the window — we do not take online orders on this site
- Catering and office lunches: use the **catering** form (48-hour notice minimum)

Check the **catalog** for today's items and whether they are on the truck or catering-only.

title: About the truck
body:
# About Sidewalk Tacos

Rosa and Miguel Villanueva started Sidewalk Tacos in 2016 with one propane plancha and a borrowed commissary slot. We still prep in the same commissary, now with a second truck for busy summer weeks.

## What we stand for

- Corn tortillas pressed to order when the line allows
- Meats marinated overnight; vegetarian filling always on the board
- Clear posted allergens at the window — ask if you need detail

We rotate breweries, office parks, and farmers markets. The **locations** page is the source of truth for where we are parked this week.

title: Where we are

hero.headline: Locations
hero.subheadline: Updated each morning — follow us if plans change for weather

body:
# Where we are this week

**Today (lunch service):** Downtown — Congress & Oak, 11:00am–2:30pm

## Upcoming stops

| Day | Location | Hours |
|-----|----------|-------|
| Tue | Congress & Oak | 11:00–14:30 |
| Wed | Riverside Office Park (Lot C) | 11:30–14:00 |
| Thu | Congress & Oak | 11:00–14:30 |
| Fri | Bayside Brewing — taproom lot | 12:00–20:00 |
| Sat | Portland Farmers Market — Row 7 | 08:30–13:00 |
| Sun | Off | — |

Rain can move us under cover at the brewery lot on Fridays. Catering jobs do not appear here — they run from the commissary kitchen.
